segments.text: Tonight we are going to worship Shri Krishna as Virat.
First is important,
To understand the incarnation of Shri Krishna
Krishna word comes from the word Krishi
Krishi means agriculture
He has sown seeds of spirituality
And for that first off all you have
the thing, where are we as far spirituality is concerned? How it's a land. So what had
happened at that time of Shri Rama – he created lots of Mariyadas and by these Mariyadas
people started mentally thinking about her I am not supposed to do this or that…
It was just a mental binding, it wasn't spontaneous.
As the result people became extremely serious – they wouldn' t talk much and they wouldn
t laugh or enjoy anything so Shri Krishna decided that first of all we must remove them
from this conditioning which has to be removed in such manner as they enjoy themselves
Then he found out there were three suggestions as far achieving the goal was concerned.
So first one, is to become a realized soul – sthita pragya-to go beyond all temptations
Go beyond all ego, go beyond all kinds of conditioning and to become a Sita Pragya.
Sita pragyay is where he doesn't feel like ordinary people attracted towards things
but is absolutely detached and this detached person doesn't take to any grievances, jealousies
all these things.
That he told – how do you achieve it?
He never told!
And the second thing that he described was that we must work afterall got all human
tendencies is to work, but the fruit of that you leave it at the lotus feet or God we call
divine power. This was another trick because he realized how human beings were twisted
and had an ego if told them something they will misinterpreted so took other way round
tell them something absurd. Now whatever work you do, your ego is intact and with that
Ego if can never give it up at the lotus feet of The Divine – then impossible! So
he made an impossible situation so after some time people will realize this cannot
be done and they'll give up this idea of leaving everything at the lotus feet
Of The Divine. This was how He prepared
the land, second thing he said Pushpam phalam toya flowers fruit
And water whatever you offer me I take it but when
When you do that, when you must have Ananya Bhakti.
Ananya means completely single-minded, when there is not the other – this only possible
after Realization!
Only After Realization You can put fruits of your work at the lotus feet
of the Divine and only after Self-realization you can have Ananya Bhakti, means a devotion
which is singular.
These absurd conditions He put for human beings because they were so much complicated!
So many people tell Me Mother we are doing ananya bhakti – how?
Because We're singing on street, taking the name God all time, we going to Pandit
You see, in rags and for one month we walk singing.
This kind of absurd ideas about bhakti he never gave but it is the way that He wanted
to neutralize the absurdities human beings – they thought this was the Bhakti which
Ananya bhakti is only possible when you are realized soul,
When your connected with the Divine.
Where there's not other
This how he tried to make three way attack
I should on human beings
On their stupidity
Because He thought that if i tell them directly do like this
Do Like That
Then they'll say of course we did it
still we never achieved it. In India, there's a big cult – people who go to Pandharpur
for one month they walk in rags singing the songs and on their way going eating food
at different places according them this is Ananya Bhakti and achieve nothing! They
have a very bad old age.
But who can tell them?
They are all lost in it, so this is the way one could tackle human beings to show their
stupidity and many people come ask Me as I told you that how we do so much bhakti of
Shri Krishna when We don't achieve anything.
So He's The One Who prepared the land for sowing.
We can say he is the one who was like a very great agriculturist, so his name was Krishy
Krishna.
There are many things I have told you about him how His Name came as Krishna then He was
called Radha or whoever was Radha and all those thing but when we talked of these
Also he told that you should become sthitaprakya, i.e., they call as jnana yoga – jnana means
knowledge so we get absolute knowlegde and he didn't say how but what is the absolute
knowledge which can be felt on your fingertips in Sahaja Yoga
Another thing was his speciality to create discretion in people
He thought by doing all these things in a stupid manner they might develop a discretion
To know that this is not the way you can achieve anything. You have to get your self realization
Discretion was very important at this juncture when we are facing a
sort of a
challenge
of this new millennium that the whole world is going to be destroyed and all those things
people are talking, it's really very important know through discretion what good
and what is bad.
One may talk of something as very good, but the Divine Discretion
Is very different and which acts by itself
Once you are in a realm of divine discretion
You cannot commit mistakes even if want to do it
I'll give my example
He went to buy a house and the fellow was, you see like a beggar he came.
We said we have nothing – no food they've taken away all our things
And were just absolutely starving
When I say that when is it?
That we are starving
So I felt pity for him
And I said, all right.
Increase the price!
First we increased our prices – still he was saying no-no give us more.
Still you increase your price?
I told my husband to increase his price though reluctantly He increased His price third
time again We increased The Price then
Then he said No will have something more than that a little
More immediately You see this discretion worked and
And I said, these are hypocrites.
I just left them and sat in the car at that right moment –that was not such a good proposition
or anything but i could see they…
…I am buying it out of my pity may call it compassion.
But above all this compassion is this discretion which says nothing doing you better get
So this Divine Discretion is a very, very important thing which we should see how it works and
shall be satisfied with.
Not to feel bad that you have missed the chance or anything but just feel really happy
That this thing has happened and that your Divine Discretion
had taken on.
So, sometimes it appears
in the Divine Discretions
you may do something wrong
or have done something wrong
but if is divine ultimately
It will turn out to be very good
I gave a basic example
But also
Very true when you practice Sahaja Yoga
The discretion, of Divine Discretion is extremely important to play a very great part in our
lives because this divine discreation gives us the real joy
our being, of ourselves. So the third point was for him to make people joyous and happy
but with all these mariadas of Shri Rama he didn't know how do it so
So, to give people joy he said all right let us dance.
Let's sing and play holy –all sorts of things-and with that He really originated
many thing which were sort not serious may look frivolous but in them there was a joy
expression.
All that he did, to give them a full idea as for Sahaja Yogi or we can say for the Self-realized
soul what should be attitude towards everything.
But it is not like you have do but just works out – It's like this in the state
of Sahaj you enjoy everything, enjoyment and that is what his idea was to create a sense
Many people, there are lots of critics have criticized this part his life according to
them religion means you should become just old at the age 20 years or a man of 8-years
something like that.
Funny ideas for religious achievement but he talked about joy and never talk of renunciation
He never talked that you give up your family,
You gave-up Your children.
Never!
He said
Enjoy with detachment
For people it is very difficult to understand
How can be without detachment?
With attachment
If you are attached
You cannot enjoy anything in a full way
Like supposing
you are attached to your child, very simple thing – you're attached to a child. If
we attach it with the child then will be bothered about things which should not there and would
give joy for that child either . You'll not allow yourself say go out or talk
people whatever is all kinds of restrictions but if
have really the Divine Discretion, then you will know with whom he should talk where
He could go what He would enjoy and that You'll see that He enjoys life.
Any attachment to anything doesn't give
view, the full-view of that person or thing.
If you are detached then it's a from above him – if you're detached and become thoughtlessly
aware also as I said now see carpets there they have very beautiful carpets here if
If they are mine, I'll be worried all the time because I'm attached that these carpets
should not get spoiled or something will go wrong.
But if i am NOT attached then look at those carpets and what do you see?
The joy!
That is put in by an artist who has made them.
And that joy really tries to reflect on Me also – that Joy comes into me.
So to have anything attachment, there will be joy I should say happiness but not joy.
Because Joy is single and happiness double – happiness or unhappiness so even if i
try enjoy something still this point it's there but Joy all pervading It has no boundaries
And you just get dissolved in the ocean of joy.
That was what Shri Krishna's idea, that to cut out these Mariyadas!
Nowadays we see so many things are really useless – for example you have discovered
the Mariyadas of religion. See, when they live in Mariadas then what happens? They sort
off coagulate or have all kinds of germination inside like a pond which is absolutely bound
It is not flowing like river.
So,like that you see it becomes a kind of closed mind with these Mariyadas and when
we have this Mariyada's ,you start thinking whether I should do or no .whether I will
enjoy to know but in the Mariyadas only you kill the joy.
Now we have other Mariyadas about say, as I should give you the religion.
There are many people who love to come to Sahaja Yoga but because they're Mariyada
of silly things in their religion – They cannot come!
The think this is our religion while they don't understand.
Falsehood becomes the Mariyadas and they do not understand that what is the Mariyada
actually made by the religion also.
You see now in Islam what is happening,
with these Mariyadas they want to have
another country this thing that thing
In other Christian religions same things happen
Also Hindu religion
all of them are really stagnating completely
and getting crushed into it
There's no discretion
because
They have said it, they do.
There are so much blindfolded about It that the cannot see what is right and wrong but
after such you can laugh at them when You Can See then we social Mariyadas which sometimes
when abandoned can become very horrid also.
Like in the West now, women think that less dress they wear more beautiful there – this
is a new thing we have started!
Now it's absurd if you see the description behind its' simple…that
we have been animals and now don't want to wear any clothes because, you know…we are
animals.
It's an animal heritage that is why so many women do not wanna wear full dresses
– it just animal behavior!
So the Mariyada of good Mariyadas also people can give up saying they will no more
We are free, we can do whatever we like.
But in that freedom what you achieve?
Your animal instinct works and your think of yourself as a very free personality!
Then there is the Mariyadasa of our country – God has not made many different countries
at all nor it's true they're from other countries but variety is there…variety
of people, variety or places is there. These varieties must be accepted as something very
artistic and one should not get ruined & confused with those ideas that we are Americans ,we
this and we are there. You're not! Now you can know after Sahaja Yoga that
your all sahajogis,
And don't belong to any country as such
The county may be long too but you dont' belong for the country
I mean work is today
To understand
That if really want
Care
For
All these
Countries in order
Then you must do some work
Work of sahaja yoga
so that people get rid of these silly ideas
or fighting for territory,
this and all over the world there's going on.
We want land, we need it!
Land belongs to God not human beings
What is use in fighting? I don't understand
But confusion and illusion are there
People work out on their confusion
and illusion to such an extent that they ruin their lives, the life of their children.
So many people are lost so many people in the lunatic asylum I should say because
there end up some sort a refugee camp then having good house nicely living
there, then you become a refugee. Why? Because they believe that
They can have their own land
and place
And should live here
This idea comes I think from some
Stupid leaders who want to
Have for themselves these lands
That's how people fight
For the land
There is no need
To fight
for land or fight your country, you'll fight this and that.
But the situation is such
That unless & until we fight
You cannot get to truth
And thats why if you remember
That Shri Krishna told Arjuna
Fight
You have to fight, Thats Your work
We've got these people
Because they are
The People who do not live with Dharma
They are adharmis, so you have to fight.
And that is how his fighting was so much justified because after fighting the war they got back
what their deserved –they were deceived and this why Shri Krishna said-that we should
not by any chance become a slave of these people but you fight it back."
So fighting also is justified in the Divine Discretion, it's again the Divine Discretion.
Where you have to fight? Because You don't want be a slave! If Your are a Slave your no good
so for that u can Fight but when people start Fighting
For separation or for territory its not correct
On contrary one should never think of separating from main lands
It creates lots of problems, but now we believe in the global religion.
We believe it's a global territory – you don't have to ask for anything anywhere
You go and are the citizen or that place anybody who goes wants
To Russia ever the whole Russians will be with
You go to America, they'll be with you.
That's how because all these are ideas of human beings and if the humans get transformed
there will no problem for any war or territory to be achieved."
This was The Divine Discretion which is instilled within us as we know that this
is a part and parcel of the Vishuddhi Chakra, where Shri Krishna resides.
But when He rises to your Sahastrara –when he rises that level then becomes Virata!
So Viratah's chakra is placed in head here about Agnya and this virat is form of Shri
Krishna, who has risen above the Agnya. When you are risen about the Agnya
You become a part and parcel of Virata's land we can say
because unless or until your above ego
No, you are still involved with yourself and with wrong ideas of Mariyadas.
But when rise above that then become the Virat – The Great!
Then You're in the land of Virata And Viratas powers is tremendous as seen by Arjuna
the form of irat. The power of irat becomes so tremendous that it acts globally,
It acts in such a manner
That you sit here and anywhere
is can act
You have seen this now many times people say
Mother its miracle
My mother was sick
And she wasn't there
I just prayed
She got alright
This is all the power of Virat.
The Power Of Virat Is That It Can Penetrate Into The Subtle Side Of Human Beings In Such
A Manner, that everything we are connected with – We Are Not Separate As Every Drop
is connected with the ocean, we are connected
to whole universe and when you become
a citizen I should say of Virat then all
things which were connected also get
your vibrations ideas
ambitions everything passes through that
And it works, you have seen how many miracles
has taken place in your life.
It is the Virata Shakti that works
Now for this we need to know
How do worship of Virat?
First off all
You must rise above your ego
Very important
Otherwise ,how can be worshipped
There is your ego standing in between and how can you rise up to the point of Virat?
You have pass through that.
Once we are above our egos, then enter into the kingdom of virata there king with a
But at that stage you become really a universal personality in way, because whatever are problems
universally.
Now not necessarily they should be attached to You or connected with You – supposing
the person is of this level now there may have been war some other country it can
stop somebody who has been oppressed and win over anywhere your compassion moves
It works out, whenever your attention will go it'll work and sometimes you are surprised
as to how this thing's worked out. How these coincidences have taken place?
Only things is that we've crossed the state of our ego
and have gone into the state of Virat, which is a very important thing to do
– it's to enter in to that area or Virata. Then you don't think this
your country…this belongs too-you …that belongs
This belonging business finishes off then
You belong to Virat
And he uses you for his own purpose
In sense when your whole thinking
is different, becomes global thinking then he acts and than his powers are many fold.
At Krishna's power it that He uses a conch to call people – I have given conches
to all the leaders, so we have now announce and call people.
But at this level of Virat you don't need do that.
At a level of virat it's just…people see they'll know!
Just –they will watch You-and They Will Know.
Just they'll think you are human beings and your so sweet, good just like gems shining
all the time.
So there will be impressed this comes through the Virata's place when You become that
then Your forget about other things Like big positions or anything you come from
very rich family or that, all these nonsensical things which are actually not true.
And the only thing on this you want to exist is no more."
People like show off their wealth and some people like to be very sort of demonstrative
of what they think there are, but in the case
a person who rises about his ego and is part
and parcel off that Virata Shakti
enters to kingdom of Virat.
He knows he's very small compared
with that and just dissolves into that Shakti
And this should happen to us that we should humble down, we should humble
and know our powers whatever they have if they give us ego
We shouldn't get rid of it.
We should actually achieve the state where you can be called as citizens
of the Virata's power.
May God bless you all!
All country leaders, please come to the stage
To wash Mother Ji feet?
Like children
You are a child then
As children we enter
as Christ has said
when entering into The Kingdom Of God
We have be like children
and that is what we need today
for us to be innocent like children
You have to be innocent like children.
